RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JAMES WELCH's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is Denied. Mr. Welch has not demonstrated the probability of prevailing on the merits. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C.
